meanings.definition: a dissolute man in fashionable society
an opening made forcibly as by pulling apart
examples: there was a rip in his pants
she had snags in her stockings

meanings.definition: a stretch of turbulent water in a river or the sea caused by one current flowing into or across another current
the act of rending or ripping or splitting something
examples: he gave the envelope a vigorous rip
The curtain ripped from top to bottom
pull the cooked chicken into strips
The tornado ripped along the coast

meanings.definition: criticize or abuse strongly and violently
examples: The candidate ripped into his opponent mercilessly
